case_title: CLAYTON, PLADER VS SWEET, LYNETTE C/O BANK OF AMERICA/BUENA VISTA BR et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA/BUENA VISTA BRANCH
